text:
The Paris Olympics' chief organiser Tony Estanguet said on Tuesday an opening ceremony on the river Seine was the "very probable" option, after French President Emmanuel Macron said it could be moved to a stadium."Today, the really main and very probable plan is to organise the ceremony on the Seine," Estanguet told RFI.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Olympics ceremony on Seine 'very probable' option  - The Standard
author: AFP
description: Macron said France was looking forward to putting on the unprecedented ceremony in which teams will sail down the Seine.
